description: A designed vertical propaganda/infographic poster (White House style) headlined 'Working Family TAX CUT.' The top portion is a color photograph of a cheering rally crowd; in the foreground a smiling woman holds up a toddler wearing a gray T-shirt reading 'american babe,' and a smiling man in a white hard hat (name 'SHAFFER' visible) stands at right, with a partly visible 'THANK YOU PRESIDENT...' sign — conveying enthusiastic working-class support. A dark blue gradient overlays the lower two-thirds. The title is set in white type ('Working Family' in italic serif, 'TAX CUT' in huge bold serif caps). Below is a checklist with white checkmark icons: 'INCREASES TAKE-HOME PAY BY OVER $10,000 ANNUALLY,' 'CREATES NEARLY ONE MILLION NEW JOBS & PROTECTS 6.1 MILLION FULL-TIME JOBS,' 'ELIMINATES TAXES ON TIPS & OVERTIME,' 'INSTITUTES PERMANENT PAID LEAVE TAX CREDIT TO SUPPORT WORKING FAMILIES,' and 'CUTS TAXES BY 15% ON AVERAGE FOR HARDWORKING AMERICANS.' A small White House seal sits at the bottom. Visual style: patriotic navy/white palette, serif headline, clean bulleted benefits list over an emotive crowd photo. Propaganda technique: bullet-point 'benefits' framing plus warm family imagery to sell the tax-cut policy. Target audience: working families and Trump supporters.
notable_text: Working Family TAX CUT / INCREASES TAKE-HOME PAY BY OVER $10,000 ANNUALLY / ELIMINATES TAXES ON TIPS & OVERTIME / CUTS TAXES BY 15% ON AVERAGE FOR HARDWORKING AMERICANS
